items.situation: annual essay competition with faculty judges
items.announcement: Good morning, students. I'm pleased to announce that the History Department's annual essay competition is now open for submissions. This year's theme is migration in the ancient world, and we're inviting essays of up to three thousand words. A panel of four faculty judges will review every entry, and the top three writers will receive cash prizes at our spring banquet. Please upload your essay to the department portal by Friday, March 14th, at noon. We won't accept late or emailed submissions, so plan ahead. If you have questions, stop by my office in Harlan Hall during regular hours.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To open an annual essay competition
options.B: To describe the spring banquet schedule
options.D: To discourage students from writing essays

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告的核心是宣布历史系一年一度的征文比赛开始接受投稿，并说明主题、字数和评审。B错（too_narrow）：春季宴会只是颁奖场合的一个细节，不是通告的整体目的。C错（wrong_purpose）：评委已有四位教师，通告并未招募评委。D错（reversed_intent）：通告是鼓励学生投稿，而非劝阻，意思相反。

questions.stem: How must students submit their essays?

options.B: By presenting them at the banquet
options.C: By uploading them to the department portal
options.D: By delivering them to Harlan Hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通告明确要求在3月14日中午前把文章上传到系里的门户网站。A错（wrong_detail）：通告说明不接受邮件投稿，与事实相反。B错（related_but_not_stated）：宴会是颁奖场合，并非提交途径。D错（misattributed_detail）：Harlan Hall是系主任办公室、用于答疑，不是提交地点，属于细节错位。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the Career Center is hosting a free professional headshot day this Wednesday for students who want to refresh their online profiles. A photographer will be set up in Room 210 from ten a.m. to three p.m., and every student will leave with a polished image ready to post. We do ask that you dress in business attire, since casual clothing won't read well in a professional photo. No appointment is needed, but lines tend to grow quickly around midday. If you can, drop by earlier in the morning to avoid the longest wait.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To launch a new photography course
options.B: To offer free professional headshots to students
options.C: To extend the Career Center's daily hours
options.D: To cancel a previously scheduled photo session

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通告的中心是职业中心本周三提供免费的专业证件照服务，供学生更新线上档案。A错（wrong_purpose）：这是一次拍照活动，不是开设摄影课程。C错（too_narrow）：通告只提到当天10点到3点的拍照时段，并非延长中心日常开放时间。D错（reversed_intent）：通告是宣布并邀请参加，而非取消，意思相反。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who arrive at midday?

options.A: They will be turned away without a photo
options.B: They must schedule an appointment in advance
options.C: They will be charged a small sitting fee
options.D: They are likely to face a longer wait

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通告说中午前后排队会迅速变长，并建议早上来以避开最长等待，由此可推断中午到场的人更可能排长队。A错（over_inference）：通告未说会被拒之门外，超出原文。B错（wrong_detail）：通告明说无需预约，与事实相反。C错（unrelated_inference）：活动是免费的，收费没有任何依据。

items.situation: honors thesis oral defense schedule announcement
items.announcement: Attention senior honors students. The schedule for this term's thesis oral defenses has now been posted outside the Biology Department office in Crane Hall. Each defense will run for forty-five minutes before a committee of three professors, and presenters should arrive fifteen minutes early to load their slides. You are required to submit your final written thesis to your advisor no later than Monday, April 7th, two weeks before your defense date. Please dress professionally, as the defense is a formal academic event. We'll provide a laptop and projector, so there's no need to bring your own equipment.

questions.stem: What are honors students required to do before their defense?

options.A: Bring their own laptop and projector
options.B: Email their slides to the committee
options.C: Submit their final thesis by April 7th
options.D: Reserve a room in Crane Hall

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通告明确要求在4月7日（周一）前把最终论文交给导师。A错（wrong_detail）：通告说会提供笔记本和投影仪，无需自带，与事实相反。B错（related_but_not_stated）：通告只说提前到场加载幻灯片，没有提到把幻灯片发邮件给委员会。D错（misattributed_detail）：Crane Hall是张贴日程的系办公室所在地，并非让学生预订房间，属于细节错位。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the thesis defense?

options.A: It is treated as a serious, formal occasion
options.B: It is open to the general public to attend
options.C: It can be rescheduled at the student's request
options.D: It replaces the written thesis requirement

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告要求着正装、提前到场、面对三位教授委员会，并称其为正式学术活动，可推断这是一个严肃、正式的场合。B错（over_inference）：是否对公众开放原文毫无提及，属过度推断。C错（unrelated_inference）：通告未提改期，没有依据。D错（wrong_detail）：书面论文仍须提交，答辩并不取代它，与事实相反。

items.announcement: Attention students, faculty, and staff. The Green Campus Initiative is organizing a riverbank cleanup this Saturday to clear litter along the stream behind the Athletic Complex. Volunteers should gather at the boathouse at eight a.m., where we'll hand out gloves, trash bags, and bottled water. The work will continue until about noon, rain or shine, so please wear old clothes and shoes you don't mind getting muddy. While no experience is needed, anyone under eighteen must bring a signed permission form. To help us plan supplies and snacks, sign up on the Initiative's website by Thursday evening.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To report pollution levels in the stream
options.B: To announce new hours for the Athletic Complex
options.C: To advertise a course on environmental science
options.D: To recruit volunteers for a riverbank cleanup

questions.explanation: 正确答案是D。通告的核心是召集志愿者参加本周六清理河岸垃圾的活动，并说明集合时间、地点和报名方式。A错（wrong_purpose）：通告未报告污染数据，只是组织清理。B错（misattributed_detail）：Athletic Complex只是用来定位河岸的地标，与开放时间无关。C错（wrong_purpose）：这是活动招募，不是宣传环境科学课程。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the cleanup event?

options.A: It will be cancelled if it rains
options.B: It will proceed even in wet weather
options.C: It is limited to fifty participants

questions.explanation: 正确答案是B。通告说活动“rain or shine”照常进行，并提醒穿不怕弄脏的旧衣旧鞋，可推断即使下雨也会照常举行。A错（wrong_detail）：与“rain or shine”直接矛盾。C错（over_inference）：通告未提人数上限，属过度推断。D错（wrong_detail）：通告明说无需经验，与事实相反。

items.situation: mock interview sessions with alumni volunteers
items.announcement: Good afternoon, everyone. The Career Center is excited to offer practice interview sessions next Tuesday, led by alumni who now work in fields like finance, healthcare, and technology. Each student will sit through a realistic twenty-minute interview and then receive honest feedback on how to improve. The sessions will take place in the Maxwell Building, room 105, between one and five in the afternoon. Because spots are limited, you must reserve a time slot through the Career Center's online calendar by this Friday. We recommend bringing a printed copy of your resume to share with your interviewer.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To offer practice interview sessions with alumni
options.B: To announce job openings in several industries
options.C: To introduce a new group of alumni donors
options.D: To cancel an upcoming career fair

questions.explanation: 正确答案是A。通告的核心是职业中心下周二提供由校友带领的模拟面试练习，并给予反馈。B错（wrong_purpose）：金融、医疗、科技只是说明校友的行业背景，并非发布招聘岗位。C错（wrong_purpose）：校友是来做面试官的，不是介绍捐赠者。D错（reversed_intent）：通告是宣布并邀请参加活动，而非取消，意思相反。

questions.stem: What must students do to take part?

options.B: Submit a writing sample in advance
options.C: Reserve a time slot online by Friday
options.D: Meet an alumnus in the finance office

questions.explanation: 正确答案是C。通告明确要求在本周五前通过职业中心的在线日历预约一个时间段。A错（related_but_not_stated）：通告未提任何费用。B错（wrong_detail）：建议带的是纸质简历，而非写作样本，篡改了关键事实。D错（misattributed_detail）：finance只是校友所在行业之一，并不存在让学生去“finance office”会面的安排，属于细节错位。
